title: stevia lucida var. oaxacana
intro: Stevia lucida var. oaxacana, also known as oaxacan sweetleaf, is a perennial shrub native to Mexico, belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Stevia lucida var. oaxacana include its potential to aid in weight management, improve oral health, and help regulate blood sugar levels. Stevia lucida var. oaxacana can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile and accessible natural remedy.
